zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Martha Domhnall - Lady of Mar於1325年出生在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾哈里斯時，她的父親Donald MacGylocher 8th Earl of Mar32歲，母親Isabella Stewart17歲。她於1368年之前與Malcolm MacLeod 3rd Clan Chief在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1402年9月5日在蘇格蘭享年77歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

nameMeanings.name: Martha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, of Aramaic rather than Hebrew origin, meaning ‘lady’. It was borne by the sister of Lazarus and Mary of Bethany (John 11:1). According to Luke 10:38, when Jesus visited the house of Mary and Martha, Mary sat at his feet, listening to him, while Martha ‘was cumbered about much serving’, so that she complained to Jesus, ‘Lord, dost thou not care that my sister hath left me to serve alone?’ For this reason, the name Martha has always been associated with hard domestic work, as opposed to the contemplative life.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Martha Domhnall - Lady of Mar was born in 1325, in Harris, Inverness-shire, Scotland, her father, Donald MacGylocher 8th Earl of Mar, was 32 and her mother, Isabella Stewart, was 17. She married Malcolm MacLeod 3rd Clan Chief before 1368, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 5 September 1402, in Scotland, at the age of 77, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Martha Domhnall - Lady of Mar est née en 1325, à Harris, Inverness-shire, Écosse, son père, Donald MacGylocher 8th Earl of Mar, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Isabella Stewart, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Malcolm MacLeod 3rd Clan Chief avant 1368, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 5 septembre 1402, à Écosse, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Martha Domhnall - Lady of Mar 1325 in Harris, Inverness-shire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Donald MacGylocher 8th Earl of Mar 32 und ihre Mutter Isabella Stewart 17. Sie hat vor 1368 in Scotland Malcolm MacLeod 3rd Clan Chief geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 5. September 1402 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Martha Domhnall - Lady of Mar è nata il nel 1325 nel Harris, Inverness-shire, Scotland, sua padre, Donald MacGylocher 8th Earl of Mar, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Isabella Stewart, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Malcolm MacLeod 3rd Clan Chief prima del 1368, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 5 settembre 1402, nel Scotland, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ko.Stornoway, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Sc: 영국 스코틀랜드 Comhairle nan Eilean Siar 스톤웨이
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Martha Domhnall - Lady of Mar(이)가 1325년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 해리스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Donald MacGylocher 8th Earl of Mar(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella Stewart(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1368년 이전 스컷랜드에서 Malcolm MacLeod 3rd Clan Chief(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1402년 9월 5일 스컷랜드에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Martha Domhnall - Lady of Mar nasceu em 1325, em Harris, Inverness-shire, Scotland, seu pai, Donald MacGylocher 8th Earl of Mar, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Stewart, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Malcolm MacLeod 3rd Clan Chief antes 1368, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. ru.Stornoway, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Sc: сторноуеи, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Martha Domhnall - Lady of Mar родилась в 1325 г. в местности харрис, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Donald MacGylocher 8th Earl of Mar было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Isabella Stewart, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Malcolm MacLeod 3rd Clan Chief перед 1368 г. в местности Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 5 сентября 1402 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 77 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.
